selected_issue.issue: Missing per-key contract diagnostics type/shape coverage metrics in replay assessment
selected_issue.title: tools/replay_verification_assess.py only measured key presence, not value type/shape conformance for required diagnostics fields

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Rank 1-4 evidence was clear on agent-base (no structural violations, canonical tests passing, no replay mismatch signal, no high-frequency diagnostic invariant failures). The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5 instrumentation: replay summary lacked per-key type/shape conformance metrics for required contract diagnostics fields.

files_changed.change: Added required key type contract and emitted type mismatch counts/rates.
Added required schema properties for contract diagnostics type coverage metrics.
Added assertions for type contract presence and zero mismatch metrics.

validation_performed.result: All required contract diagnostics keys present and type mismatch counts/rates are zero for canonical multimatch fixture.
Default raw fixture summary includes new type coverage fields with zero mismatches.

before_after_evidence.before: Replay summary had diagnostics key presence/missing metrics only; no required type contract or per-key type mismatch metrics.
before_after_evidence.after: Replay summary now includes required per-key type contract metadata and type mismatch counts/rates; canonical fixtures currently show zero mismatches.

unresolved_risks: Type/shape checks do not yet enforce deeper semantic constraints such as value ranges and inter-field relationships.
Type contract mapping is maintained in code and must be kept in sync with future diagnostics contract changes.
stop_reason: Stopped after selected rank-5 instrumentation gap was fixed with minimal bounded edits and repeated validation; further semantic-quality expansion is out of single-issue scope.
